My
Work

Every project is scoped to a real problem and built to outlast the engagement. Client results, not concept decks.

1 Live Case Study
More Coming Soon
Wichita, KS
01

Featured
Project

// Featured Project Live
Adams Jones Law Firm
Wichita, KS  ·  2025
Webflow Redesign & CMS Buildout

A prominent Wichita law firm needed a site that matched their reputation — professional, fast, and fully manageable by their own team. We rebuilt the entire site in Webflow with a structured CMS, a mobile-first layout, and zero developer dependency going forward.

Deliverables
  • New site architecture & information hierarchy
  • Mobile-first responsive design across all breakpoints
  • Webflow CMS buildout with client-editable content areas
  • Attorney profiles, practice area pages, and blog system
  • Client training & handoff documentation
WebflowCMSMobile OptimizationWeb DesignLawWichita
View Live Site →

03

Built Because
They Needed to Exist

Tools I built to solve recurring operational problems — not commissioned, just necessary.

// Internal Tool Live
SortShelf
File Organization Utility · Windows

A lightweight Windows utility that automatically sorts a target folder by file type — documents, images, spreadsheets, scripts, and archives — into clean subdirectories. Includes live sort and one-step undo. Built after one too many chaotic Downloads folders.

PowerShell Windows Automation CLI
// Internal Tool Live
IT Logger
Internal Ticket Tracker · Local

A lightweight internal ticketing system built for environments that don't need — and won't adopt — enterprise helpdesk software. Logs issues, tracks status, and runs locally with zero external dependencies or licensing costs.

Python Flask SQLite Internal Tooling
// Work With Us

Your Project
Could Be Next.

We take on a limited number of engagements at a time. If you have a problem worth solving, let's talk scope.
